consistency.name_vs_class: Consistent. 'Expertise' is a common feature name for classes that gain specialized skill proficiency, fitting for a 'bard'.
consistency.level_progression: Mechanically sound. Gaining the initial benefit at level 3 is standard for feature acquisition. The upgrade at level 10 suggests a tiered power progression.

quality.clarity: Very clear. The description explicitly states the mechanical effect (doubled proficiency bonus) and the trigger (ability checks using chosen skills).
quality.completeness: Complete. It defines the initial acquisition (level 3) and the enhancement/expansion (level 10).
quality.flavor: Mechanically focused, but accurately reflects the concept of a highly skilled bard gaining mastery in specific areas.

mechanics.core_effect: Doubled Proficiency Bonus (Expertise). This is a very powerful feature, significantly improving success rates for the chosen skills.
mechanics.trigger: Ability checks using the chosen skills.
mechanics.scaling: Scales well by allowing the player to select two *additional* skills at level 10, increasing versatility without diminishing the existing choices.

analysis.suggestions: None required; the feature is well-defined and standard for this type of ability.
